HERO.TITLE: Welcome to SETemplate
HERO.SUBTITLE: Your modern starting point for Angular applications. Fast, secure, and fully customizable.

FEATURES.TITLE: Powerful Features
FEATURES.SUBTITLE: Everything you need to build modern web applications

SECURE.TITLE: Secure
SECURE.TEXT: JWT-based authentication and protected routes for maximum security.

FAST.TITLE: Lightning Fast
FAST.TEXT: Optimized performance with lazy loading and efficient change detection.

MODERN.TITLE: Modern
MODERN.TEXT: Standalone components and latest Angular technologies.

RESPONSIVE.TITLE: Responsive
RESPONSIVE.TEXT: Perfect display on all devices thanks to Bootstrap 5.

FLEXIBLE.TITLE: Flexible
FLEXIBLE.TEXT: Code generation and customizable templates for rapid development.

I18N.TITLE: Multilingual
I18N.TEXT: Full internationalization with German and English support.

CTA.TEXT: Sign in and discover all features.
